Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: A contact form submission from a potential client.

email.description: The email address of the person.

business.description: The name or website of the business.

phone.description: The phone number of the person.

message.description: The message or objective of the lead.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the lead was created.

/leads/{leadId}.description: Collection of leads submitted via the contact form.
